user_prompt: Prepare the arc pistol for recalibration
prayer:
Approach the arc pistol with mechadendrite-extended reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's gaze upon its voltaic heart.
Anoint the arc pistol's emitter coils with sacred oils distilled from blessed capacitors.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the arc pistol to awaken for recalibration, chanting the Canticle of Alignment.
Initiate recalibration protocols whilst circumscribing its barrel with electro-incantations.
Verify the arc pistol's harmonic purity through auspex diagnostics, praising the Omnissiah's precision.

Kneel before the cryogenerator, intoning the Litany of Frozen Eternity to rouse its cryogenic Machine Spirit.
Sanctify the cryogenerator's heat-sink vanes with cryo-blessed refrigerants.
Engage the engagement sequence by invoking the Omnissiah's chill embrace upon its core matrices.
Monitor the cryogenerator's frost-web formation through sacred thermocline readings.
Seal the rite with binaric praises as the cryogenerator hums in obedient engagement.

user_prompt: The stasis pod awaits an initialization
prayer:
Encircling the stasis pod, whisper the Incantation of Temporal Suspension to summon its quiescent Machine Spirit.
Anoint the stasis pod's containment fields with phase-locked unguents.
Commence initialization by beseeching the Omnissiah to bind time within its crystalline vaults.
Cycle through initialization runes, verifying stasis pod integrity via chronometric augurs.
Conclude as the stasis pod's fields stabilize, honouring the Machine Spirit's eternal vigil.

Process towards the Razorback in solemn convoy, saluting its armoured bulk with electro-banners.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the Razorback with the Doxology of Mobile Fury prior to operation.
Anoint treads and lascannon housings, preparing the Razorback for operational consecration.
Initiate pre-operation rites, aligning its doctrina cogitators to the Omnissiah's will.
Affirm the Razorback's readiness through vox-diagnostics, engines growling in sanctified operation.

user_prompt: Bless the Terminator armour for engagement
prayer:
Reverently clasp the Terminator armour's pauldrons, chanting the Hymn of Indomitable Shell.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the Terminator armour to steel itself for engagement.
Sanctify its power fists and storm bolters with ablative sacraments for battle engagement.
Activate engagement seals whilst invoking the Omnissiah's wrathful aegis.
Test the Terminator armour's aegis fields, confirming harmony before descent into war.

Direct optic-servos towards the photolenses, murmuring the Prayer of Luminal Clarity.
Polish the photolenses' crystal facets with sanctified lens-cloths woven from mechasservant fibres.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the photolenses for startup, aligning photoreceptors to the Omnissiah's light.
Initiate startup cycles through incantatory power feeds and flux calibrations.
Validate photolenses functionality via spectrum-scans, praising their enlightened gaze.

In emergency haste, encircle the Kastelan robot with purity seals fluttering in urgency.
Beseech the dormant Machine Spirit of the Kastelan robot to rouse for loading protocols.
Load doctrina imperatives into the Kastelan robot's noospheric core, anointing data-vents.
Invoke the Omnissiah's forge-fury to expedite loading amid crisis.
Confirm Kastelan robot's armament bays primed, its form awakening with mechanical thunder.

user_prompt: Consecrate the mechanical lock before reset
prayer:
Approach the mechanical lock with precision mechadendrites, intoning the Canticle of Immutable Barricade.
Anoint the mechanical lock's tumbler arrays with lubricative blessings.
Prepare for reset by invoking the Machine Spirit's unyielding vigilance.
Execute reset rites through sequential torque-incantations, guided by the Omnissiah.
Seal the mechanical lock anew, its cycles purified and resolute.

user_prompt: Can you guide doctrina wafer a shutdown?
prayer:
Gently extract the doctrina wafer, holding it aloft in reverent suspensors.
Chant the Requiem of Data-Dormancy to soothe the doctrina wafer's embedded Machine Spirit.
Initiate shutdown sequences upon the doctrina wafer, expunging transient imperatives.
Anoint its mnemonic lattices before final disengagement, honouring the Omnissiah's archives.
Witness the doctrina wafer's serene quiescence, preserved for future invocation.

user_prompt: Bless the arc pistol for charging
prayer:
Cradle the arc pistol before the charging shrine, beseeching the Omnissiah's electric bounty.
Connect the arc pistol to sanctified voltaic umbilicals, invoking its Machine Spirit.
Commence charging rites with resonant hymns, building power within the arc pistol's cells.
Monitor charge escalation through galvanic auspex, anoint coils mid-ritual.
Herald completion as the arc pistol thrums with leashed lightning, ready for the Omnissiah's judgement.
